patterns.readme_structure: Comprehensive README with sections: Overview, Purpose, Features, Getting Started, Documentation, Status, Tech Stack, Contributing, License, Contact
patterns.emoji_usage: Section headers use emojis for visual organization (📋, 🎯, ✨, 🚀, etc.)
patterns.documentation_style: Clear, structured, with code examples and step-by-step instructions

verification_needed: Confirm README.md meets all spec requirements
Check for broken links (references to non-existent files are noted)
Ensure content is accurate for greenfield project status
